/usr/bin/ar qc libsabre_esp32.a CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/clients/mqtt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/clients/ntp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/gpio/input_gpio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/gpio/output_gpio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/service/service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/system/wall_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/uart/uart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/utility/wait_for.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/wifi/wifi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/wifi/wifi_soft_ap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sabre_esp32.dir/sabre_esp32/wifi/wifi_station.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsabre_esp32.a
